prompt: Generate a chart infographic combining the 3D bar graph style from image 1 with multi-segment ring charts featuring detailed text and percentages, similar to those in image 2. Use a clean, modern layout.
prompt_refined: Generate a chart infographic with a clean, modern layout, featuring distinct, rounded rectangular sections similar to the overall template in image 1. Include a prominent 3D bar graph section in the bottom half, characterized by cylindrical columns and a clear axis, directly inspired by the 'Main Performance' chart in image 1. In the top half, incorporate multiple multi-segment ring charts. These should feature detailed text labels within segments (e.g., 'Product A'), explicit percentage values (e.g., '30%'), and optionally include small descriptive icons within some segments or the chart's center, drawing heavily from the diverse styles of segmented ring charts shown in image 2.
objects: Chart infographic with a clean, modern layout
Prominent 3D bar graph section in the bottom half
Cylindrical columns within the 3D bar graph
Clear axis for the 3D bar graph
Multiple multi-segment ring charts in the top half
Detailed text labels within ring chart segments
Explicit percentage values within ring chart segments
Small descriptive icons within some ring chart segments
Small descriptive icons in the center of some ring charts
